The '''Medallion of Honor''' was a military award of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] at the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. It was a golden medallion with scarlet ribbon.

[[Halagad Ventor]] earned one for his service in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] under [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|General Kenobi]].
